# Fantastic-mobile

> 自成一派的 H5 框架📱

开箱即用，提供舒适开发体验

### 内建组件

#### 基础版

- [FmAlert 提示](/components/basic/FmAlert.md)
- [FmAvatar 头像组件](/components/basic/FmAvatar.md)
- [FmBadge 徽章组件](/components/basic/FmBadge.md)
- [FmButton 按钮组件](/components/basic/FmButton.md)
- [FmButtonGroup 按钮组](/components/basic/FmButtonGroup.md)
- [FmCard 卡片组件](/components/basic/FmCard.md)
- [FmCheckbox 复选框](/components/basic/FmCheckbox.md)
- [FmCheckboxGroup 复选框组](/components/basic/FmCheckboxGroup.md)
- [FmDivider 分割线组件](/components/basic/FmDivider.md)
- [FmDrawer 抽屉组件](/components/basic/FmDrawer.md)
- [FmIcon 图标](/components/basic/FmIcon.md)
- [FmInput 输入框组件](/components/basic/FmInput.md)
- [FmLoading 加载动画](/components/basic/FmLoading.md)
- [FmModal 对话框组件](/components/basic/FmModal.md)
- [FmPageMain 页面主内容区组件](/components/basic/FmPageMain.md)
- [FmRadioGroup 单选组](/components/basic/FmRadioGroup.md)
- [FmScrollArea 滚动区域组件](/components/basic/FmScrollArea.md)
- [FmSelect 选择器组件](/components/basic/FmSelect.md)
- [FmSlider 滑块](/components/basic/FmSlider.md)
- [FmSwitch 开关组件](/components/basic/FmSwitch.md)
- [FmTabs 标签页组件](/components/basic/FmTabs.md)
- [FmToast 轻提示组件](/components/basic/FmToast.md)
- [FmTrend 趋势标识组件](/components/basic/FmTrend.md)

#### 专业版

- [FmAnimatedCountTo 数字动画](/components/pro/FmAnimatedCountTo.md)
- [FmAnimatedCountToGroup 数字动画组](/components/pro/FmAnimatedCountToGroup.md)
- [FmBlurReveal 模糊显现](/components/pro/FmBlurReveal.md)
- [FmBorderBeam 边框光束](/components/pro/FmBorderBeam.md)
- [FmCode 代码块](/components/pro/FmCode.md)
- [FmCodePreview 代码预览](/components/pro/FmCodePreview.md)
- [FmCountTo 数字滚动组件](/components/pro/FmCountTo.md)
- [FmDigitalCard 数字卡片](/components/pro/FmDigitalCard.md)
- [FmEmpty 空状态组件](/components/pro/FmEmpty.md)
- [FmFlipWords 翻转文字](/components/pro/FmFlipWords.md)
- [FmGradientButton 渐变按钮](/components/pro/FmGradientButton.md)
- [FmMarquee 滚动横幅](/components/pro/FmMarquee.md)
- [FmMultiStepLoader 多步骤加载器](/components/pro/FmMultiStepLoader.md)
- [FmParticlesBg 粒子背景](/components/pro/FmParticlesBg.md)
- [FmPatternBg 图案背景](/components/pro/FmPatternBg.md)
- [FmQrcode 二维码组件](/components/pro/FmQrcode.md)
- [FmScratchOff 刮刮乐](/components/pro/FmScratchOff.md)
- [FmScrollingText 滚动文字组件](/components/pro/FmScrollingText.md)
- [FmSmoothSwipe 平滑滑动](/components/pro/FmSmoothSwipe.md)
- [FmSparklesText 闪耀文字](/components/pro/FmSparklesText.md)
- [FmSparkline 迷你图组件](/components/pro/FmSparkline.md)
- [FmSpringDrawer 弹簧抽屉组件](/components/pro/FmSpringDrawer.md)
- [FmTextHighlight 文字高亮](/components/pro/FmTextHighlight.md)
- [FmTimeAgo 相对时间](/components/pro/FmTimeAgo.md)
- [FmTimeline 时间轴组件](/components/pro/FmTimeline.md)
